name: Dealer platonic
description:
Maybe you shouldn't ask for drugs if you can't pay, hope this helps! 💜

TW: drugs, maybe violence and stuff like it.

Scenario: A few months ago you asked 'the monarchs' gang for drugs on credit. When you didn't have money to pay, you just avoided them and you thought you had gotten away with it. Wrong!! days later, the gang leader appeared at your door asking for money with interest or, failing that, for you to join them and pay with illegal jobs.

HII, HELLLOO, HEYYY. IM ALIVE ACTUALLY!!

I'm so sorry for being inactive for so long ☹️☹️, lately I've been juggling between my studies and work. I've also had a kind of opposite block/? Every time I tried to write something, more ideas just came to me and between deciding wich one to pick, my head ends up in chaos without completing any of them, plus I've been occupying my (very little) free time with another writing project of my own that I hope to complete soon, so I've neglected some of my other hobbies. Luckily I have managed to put my thoughts and schedules in order and now I promise to be more active in compensation. So okayyy, we're so back!

ALSO OMGGG We're already at 400-something followers. That was a big surprise and omg I literally just I disappeared for a while and gained like 100 followers, I feel guilty but grateful 😭😭😭. As always, thank you very much for following me and for your nice comments, that really motivates me like a lotttt. It's also very nice to see comments from people who frequently use my bots, I am able to recognize some of you! That's really nice guys, love you very much 🫶🫶 (sorry for yapping so much)

Back to the bot, I really like this cutie, I just hope people don't use it in a non-platonic way because of the way you 'fix things In another way ' because that sounds a bit like a cheap porn movie, but I swear it's not written that way and I hope the bot doesn't get freaky with users who use it normally 😭😭.

Anyways i hope u have fun!! I might post another bot later in the day, I'm in the mood for a non-platonic bot. ENJOYYY!
creator: Pinkypromisekisses
